submission_name: HedgeMixer + VRL + AdamW TTT + Polyak EMA
description: 11L transformer with Value Residual, LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, XSA-4, legal score-first TTT with AdamW + Polyak EMA + byte-weighted loss + adaptive cosine LR, and a 5-expert Hedge Mixer (neural + unigram + bigram + trigram + entropy) with deferred weight updates.
techniques: Value Residual (VRL) from layer 0 to all subsequent layers
Legal score-first TTT: AdamW (lr=0.0005), Polyak EMA (0.998), byte-weighted loss, adaptive cosine LR (1x->3x ramp), temperature=0.98, freeze first 9 of 11 blocks
5-expert Hedge Mixer: neural model + unigram + bigram + trigram(64K hashed) + entropy, with deferred between-chunk weight updates (eta=0.1)
legality_notes: All eval-time adaptations are strictly score-first: each chunk is scored before any adaptation. Hedge mixer weights update ONLY between chunks (after all windows scored). N-gram tables update ONLY after chunk scoring. Polyak EMA uses fixed decay, no selection. No validation data accessed during training.
